zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray於1090年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Duncan52歲，母親Æthelreda of Northumbria26歲。他於大約1114年與Gruaidh of Moray在英國蘇格蘭莫雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1138年登記服兵役。他於1130年被列為mormaer of moray。他去世於1147年在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray于1090年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲Duncan52岁，母亲Æthelreda of Northumbria26岁。他于大约1114年与Gruaidh of Moray在英国苏格兰莫雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1138年登记服兵役。他于1130年被列为mormaer of moray。他去世于1147年在苏格兰培爾培斯享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray was born in 1090, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Duncan, was 52 and his mother, Æthelreda of Northumbria, was 26. He married Gruaidh of Moray about 1114, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1138. In 1130, his occupation is listed as mormaer of moray. He died in 1147, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray est né en 1090, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Duncan, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Æthelreda of Northumbria, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Gruaidh of Moray environ 1114, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1138. En 1130, sa profession de son indiquée est mormaer of moray. Il est décédé en 1147, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray 1090 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan 52 und seine Mutter Æthelreda of Northumbria 26. Er hat um 1114 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom Gruaidh of Moray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1138 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1130 ist sein Beruf als mormaer of moray aufgeführt. Er starb 1147 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray è nato il nel 1090 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Duncan, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Æthelreda of Northumbria, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Gruaidh of Moray circa 1114, nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1138. Nel 1130, la sua occupazione è indicata come mormaer of moray. Morì nel 1147, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzDuncan Earl of Morayが1090年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Duncanは52歳，母Æthelreda of Northumbriaは26歳であった。約1114年にイギリススコットランドモーアイでGruaidh of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1138年に兵役登録をした。1130年，職業はmormaer of morayと記録されている。彼は1147年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで57歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray(이)가 1090년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Æthelreda of Northumbria(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1114년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 Gruaidh of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1138년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1130년, 그의 직업은 mormaer of moray이었다. 그는 1147년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray nasceu em 1090, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Æthelreda of Northumbria, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Gruaidh of Moray aproximadamente 1114, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1138. Em 1130, sua profissão aparece como mormaer of moray. Ele faleceu em 1147, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray родился в 1090 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Æthelreda of Northumbria, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Gruaidh of Moray около 1114 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1138 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1130 годуработал по профессии mormaer of moray. Он умер в 1147 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzDuncan Earl of Moray nació en 1090, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Duncan, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Æthelreda of Northumbria, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gruaidh of Moray aproximadamente 1114, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1138. En 1130, su ocupación registrada era mormaer of moray. Murió en 1147, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
